# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Target - Build, Test, Comment

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: write

concurrency:
  group: pr-target-tests-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build-test-and-comment:
    if: ${{ !github.event.pull_request.draft }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code (untrusted)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          persist-credentials: false
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        id: build
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Test
        id: test
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Compose comment body
        id: body
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          BUILD_OUTCOME="${{ steps.build.outcome }}"
          TEST_OUTCOME="${{ steps.test.outcome }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
          SHA="${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}"
          REF="${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}"
          REPO="${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name }}"

          if [[ "$BUILD_OUTCOME" == "success" && "$TEST_OUTCOME" == "success" ]]; then
            STATUS="✅ Success"
          else
            STATUS="❌ Failed"
          fi

          {
            echo "### CI Results: ${STATUS}"
            echo ""
            echo "- Head: \`${REPO}@${REF}\`"
            echo "- Commit: \`${SHA}\`"
            echo "- Build: **${BUILD_OUTCOME}**"
            echo "- Tests: **${TEST_OUTCOME}**"
            echo ""
            echo "[View logs](${RUN_URL})"
          } > comment.md

      - name: Find previous comment
        id: find_comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;
            const marker = "### CI Results:";
            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.issues.listComments({
              owner, repo, issue_number, per_page: 100
            });
            const botId = context.actor;
            const existing = comments.find(c =>
              c.user?.type === "Bot" &&
              c.body?.includes(marker) &&
              c.body?.includes(`[View logs](${context.serverUrl}/${owner}/${repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId})`) === false
            ) || comments.reverse().find(c =>
              c.user?.type === "Bot" && c.body?.includes(marker)
            );
            core.setOutput("comment_id", existing ? String(existing.id) : "");

      - name: Create or update PR comment
        if: always()
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require("fs");
            const body = fs.readFileSync("comment.md", "utf8");
            const { owner, repo } = context.repo;
            const issue_number = context.payload.pull_request.number;
            const comment_id = "${{ steps.find_comment.outputs.comment_id }}";

            if (comment_id) {
              await github.rest.issues.updateComment({
                owner, repo,
                comment_id: Number(comment_id),
                body
              });
            } else {
              await github.rest.issues.createComment({
                owner, repo,
                issue_number,
                body
              });
            }

      - name: Fail workflow if tests failed
        if: ${{ steps.test.outcome != 'success' || steps.build.outcome != 'success' }}
        run: exit 1
